description: Soccer shoes for men from fila. For the fashionable soccer fan, these shoes combine style with performance. Enhanced foot support and lugs for superior grip make this shoe a great buy. This shoe makes for excellent casual wear. Pair it with training shorts and a tee or your favourite denims and a polo t-shirt. Upper Synthetic leather upper with leather overlays and stitch detailing for good shoe structure Central lacing system  Padded tongue with embroidered branding Cushioned inner with mesh lining Padded sockliner with embroidered branding Outsole reinforced at the heel cup and toe box for abrasion-free comfort Outsole Upper glued to the outsole for durability TPR outsole with terraced grooves on the fore foot and back foot Geometrical lugs with grooves on the midfoot area for enhanced grip Shoe care Wipe with damp cloth to remove dust Do not store under sunlight
